query: SELECT id AS "id: Id<Races>" FROM races WHERE NOT ignored AND room IS NULL AND start IS NOT NULL AND start > NOW() AND (custom_title IS NULL OR custom_create_room) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM races r2 WHERE r2.companion_race_id = races.id) AND (start <= NOW() + TIME '01:00:00' OR (team1 IS NULL AND p1_discord IS NULL AND p1 IS NULL AND (series != 's' OR event != 'w') AND start <= NOW() + TIME '01:00:00'))
